verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Saviour, Redeemer, Lifted me from the miry clay, Almighty, Forever, I will never be the same

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause You came near, From the everlasting, To the world we live, The Father's only Son

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You lived, and You died You rose again on high You've opened the way, For the world to live again, Hallelujah, For all you've done

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, For all You've done Hallelujah, For all You've done
